Task description instruction explicitly asks to visit 'https://check.torproject.org/'.
Playwright measurement of https://community.torproject.org/onion-services/overview/ yields a scrollHeight of ~10730px, confirming 2000 is a valid minimum threshold.
Standard 1080p display and Playwright viewport testing confirms that viewport screenshots will be less than 1200px (typically 800-1080px).

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on live internet access to real torproject.org sites via Tor Browser. Playwright measurements confirmed that the Tor Onion Services Overview page is over 10,000px in height, validating the verifier's 2000px min_full_height threshold for a full-page capture. The Tor Check page fits within a standard display viewport, validating the 1200px max_viewport_height threshold. All file and directory paths in metadata correctly match the explicit instructions given to the agent in the task description.
